description: Rental contract. In Hebrew. Dated: Tuesday, 15 Sivan 54[..], so 1640–1739 CE. Location: possibly Cairo, based on the reference to Ḥārat al-Saqāliba in line 4. Sara bt. Yiṣḥaq Malkhī, the widow of Shemuel ha-Levi Kaʿk(?), in the presence of her late husband's son Menaḥem, leases the ʿaliya above the qāʿa where they live to Avraham ha-Kohen b. Yosef for a period of 12 months. The rent is 30 medins per month ('fine and good' ones). Verso: Brief line of writing in pencil, in cursive English: "rest in I." It is unclear why these words would have been recorded as part of any conservation process, which would explain the usage of pencil.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
